name: tooltip
description: A floating contextual label, CSS-only; WAI-ARIA tooltip pattern (panel role=tooltip + the trigger's aria-describedby). Revealed by group-hover/group-focus-within. Plain HTML + Tailwind + --lv-* tokens, zero JS, CSP-clean.
docs: Copies the tooltip partial to your JTE root at lievit/tooltip.jte, reached as @template.lievit.tooltip(content="...", tipId="...", trigger=@`...`). Put aria-describedby=tipId on the interactive trigger so the label is announced on focus. The source is yours: edit freely.
